mapper.select:
SELECT D.* FROM (SELECT DPG.IDX, T.NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT DP.TARGET_ID)-1 AS NAME_CNT, T.PLATFORM, DP.TARGET_ID, DPG.data_processing_name AS FILENAME, DATE_FORMAT(DP.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(DPU.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS OKDATE, CASE WHEN DPU.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'E' THEN '완료' WHEN DPU.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'D' THEN '반려' WHEN DPU.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'W' THEN '대기' ELSE '' END APPROVAL_STATUS, DPU.APPROVAL_STATUS AS STATUS, DPU.CHARGE_USER_FLAGE, DPG.NOTE, DPG.USER_NO, (SELECT USER_NAME FROM pi_user U WHERE U.USER_NO = DPG.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, DPU.OK_USER_NO, DP.AP_NO, DP.NOTEPAD, DP.ADD_CONTENT, DP.APPROVAL_TYPE AS APPROVAL_FLAG, DPG.PROCESSING_FLAG, PDF.TYPE AS APPROVAL_GROUP_FLAG, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT T.name) AS NAMELIST, CASE WHEN PDF.TYPE = 0 THEN '오탐' WHEN PDF.TYPE = 1 THEN '정탐' WHEN PDF.TYPE = 2 THEN '경로 예외' ELSE '' END AS APPROVAL_PIC_STATUS FROM pi_data_processing_flag PDF, PI_DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP DPG LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATA_PROCESSING DP ON DP.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX = DPG.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGETS T ON DP.TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = T.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AROCESSING_USER_VIEW DPU ON DPG.USER_NO = DPU.USER_NO AND DPG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID = DPU.CHARGE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO WHERE 1=1 AND PDF.processing_flag = DPG.processing_flag
AND TU.USER_NO = (#{user_no})
AND DATE_FORMAT(DPG.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(DPU.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DPG.IDX ) D WHERE 1=1
AND
NAMELIST LIKE CONCAT('%', #{item}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_PHONE, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, G.TEAM_NAME AS OFFICE_NM FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE AND U.USER_NO != #{user_no} AND USER_GRADE IN (6,7) ORDER BY U.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code} DESC, U.JIKWEE

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, U.USER_PHONE, G.TEAM_NAME AS OFFICE_NM FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE
AND USER_GRADE NOT IN (0)
AND G.TEAM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTeamName}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
ORDER BY U.INSA_CODE = #{insa_code} DESC, U.JIKWEE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_data_processing_charge_group ( data_processing_charge_name, user_no, approval_status, REGDATE, reason, DOC_ID ) values ( CONCAT(#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{doc_seq}), #{user_no}, #{apprType}, NOW(), #{comment}, #{IFIDVALUE} )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT data_processing_charge_id FROM pi_data_processing_charge_group WHERE data_processing_charge_name = CONCAT(#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{doc_seq})
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_account_info SET approval_id = approval_id + 1 WHERE user_id = (#{user_no})
mapper.select: SELECT DPG.idx AS GROUP_ID, DPCG.data_processing_charge_id AS CHARGE_ID, DPCG.data_processing_charge_name AS CHARGE_NAME, DPG.user_no, DPG.data_processing_name, (SELECT processing_flag_name FROM pi_data_processing_flag WHERE processing_flag = DPG.processing_flag) AS FLAG, F.PATH, DP.APPROVAL_TYPE FROM PI_FIND AS F ,pi_data_processing AS DP ,pi_data_processing_group AS DPG ,PI_DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_GROUP AS DPCG ,PI_AROCESSING_USER_VIEW AS AUV WHERE 1=1 AND DP.target_id = F.target_id AND DP.hash_id = F.hash_id AND DPG.idx = DP.data_processing_group_idx AND AUV.CHARGE_ID = DPG.IDX AND AUV.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'W' AND DPG.data_processing_charge_id = DPCG.data_processing_charge_id AND AUV.OK_USER_NO = #{user_no} ORDER BY DPCG.data_processing_charge_id DESC, DPG.idx

SELECT '0' CHK, DPCG.data_processing_charge_id AS CHARGE_ID, DPCG.data_processing_charge_name AS PATH, DPCG.USER_NO, PU.USER_NAME, UV.OK_USER_NO AS OK_USER_NO, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = PU.USER_NAME) AS OK_USER_NAME,
DPU.CHARGE_USER_FLAGE, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = UV.OK_USER_NO) AS ADMIN_USER_NAME, DPU.APPROVAL_STATUS AS APPROVAL_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(UV.OKDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS OKDATE,
UV.CHARGE_USER_FLAGE, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = UV.ok_user_no) AS ADMIN_USER_NAME, UV.APPROVAL_STATUS AS APPROVAL_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(UV.OKDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS OKDATE,
DATE_FORMAT(UV.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE, UV.APPROVAL_TYPE AS APPROVAL_TYPE, DPG.NOTE, CASE WHEN DPF.TYPE = 0 THEN '오탐' WHEN DPF.TYPE = 1 THEN '정탐' WHEN DPF.TYPE = 2 THEN '경로 예외' ELSE '' END AS APPROVAL_PIC_STATUS FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING_FLAG DPF,PI_DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_GROUP DPCG LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_USER PU ON PU.USER_NO = DPCG.USER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP DPG ON DPG.USER_NO = DPCG.USER_NO AND DPG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID = DPCG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AROCESSING_USER_VIEW UV ON UV.CHARGE_ID = DPCG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID AND UV.USER_NO = PU.USER_NO
AND (UV.USER_NO = #{user_no} OR UV.OK_USER_NO = #{user_no}) LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATA_PROCESSING_USER DPU ON DPU.CHARGE_ID = DPG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND DPF.processing_flag = DPG.processing_flag
AND UV.APPROVAL_STATUS = #{status}
AND DATE_FORMAT(DPCG.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND PU.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%')
AND DPCG.data_processing_charge_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{path},'%')
AND (DPU.USER_NO = #{user_no} OR DPU.OK_USER_NO = #{user_no} )
AND DPU.USER_NO = #{user_no}
GROUP BY DPCG.DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID ORDER BY DPCG.REGDATE DESC, UV.OKDATE DESC

SELECT DPG.idx AS CHARGE_ID, DP.TARGET_ID, DPG.user_no, DPG.data_processing_name, (SELECT processing_flag_name FROM pi_data_processing_flag WHERE processing_flag = DPG.processing_flag) AS FLAG, F.PATH,
DPG.APPROVAL_STATUS AS STATUS, DPG.REASON AS REASON, DPG.REASON AS RETURN_REASON, CASE IFNULL(F.FID,'X') != 'X' WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FID, F.HASH_ID AS ID,
DP.AP_NO AS AP_NO,
IFNULL(DPG.NOTEPAD,'') AS NOTEPAD FROM PI_FIND AS F ,pi_data_processing AS DP ,pi_data_processing_group AS DPG WHERE 1=1 AND DP.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND DP.target_id = F.target_id AND DP.hash_id = F.hash_id AND DP.approval_type != 2 AND DPG.idx = DP.data_processing_group_idx AND DPG.data_processing_charge_id IN
#{charge_id_list}
ORDER BY DPG.idx

SELECT IDX, POLICY_NAME, POLICY_VERSION, REGDATE, COMMENT, DATATYPE_ID, SCHEDULE_LABEL, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, SCHEDULE_CPU, SCHEDULE_DATA, SCHEDULE_MEMORY, SCHEDULE_TRACE, DMZ, MANAGE, DEVELOP, DEFAULT_CHECK FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY WHERE 1=1 AND default_check = 1

SELECT DPG.IDX, DPG.TARGET_ID, L.LOCATION_ID, F.PATH FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP AS DPG ,PI_DATA_PROCESSING AS DP ,PI_FIND F ,PI_TARGETS T ,PI_LOCATIONS L WHERE 1=1 AND DP.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX = DPG.IDX AND F.GROUP_ID = DP.GROUP_ID AND F.TARGET_ID = DP.TARGET_ID AND F.HASH_ID = DP.HASH_ID AND T.TARGET_ID = DPG.TARGET_ID AND T.GROUP_ID = L.GROUP_ID AND T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND L.DESCRIPTION = 'All local files' AND DPG.IDX IN
#{group_list}
mapper.delete: DELETE DPG, DP FROM pi_data_processing_group AS DPG JOIN pi_data_processing AS DP ON DPG.idx = DP.data_processing_group_idx WHERE DPG.idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT DPS.ID AS ID, LPAD(IFNULL(DPS.ID,0)+1, 10,0) AS ID_LENGTH, DPS.USER_NO AS USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USER_NO = #{user_no}) AS USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DPS.REGDATE, '%Y%m%d') AS REGDATE FROM pi_data_processing_seq DPS WHERE DPS.REGDATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') UNION ALL SELECT 0, LPAD(1, 10,0) AS ID_LENGTH, '', (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USER_NO = #{user_no}) AS USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_DATA_PROCESSING_SEQ (ID, USER_NO, REGDATE) VALUES (#{index}, #{user_no}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'))
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS( SELECT F.TARGET_ID, F.FID, F.HASH_ID, F.PATH, F.AP_NO, 0 AS SUBPATH, F.hash_id AS P_ID FROM PI_FIND F WHERE F.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND F.HASH_ID = #{hash_id} AND F.AP_NO = #{ap_no} UNION ALL SELECT S.TARGET_ID, S.INFO_ID ,S.NODE_ID, CTE.PATH, S.AP_NO, 1 AS SUBPATH, CTE.P_ID FROM PI_SUBPATH S INNER JOIN CTE ON S.TARGET_ID = CTE.TARGET_ID AND S.parent_id = CTE.HASH_ID ) SELECT CTE.TARGET_ID, CTE.FID, CTE.HASH_ID, CTE.PATH, CTE.AP_NO, CTE.SUBPATH, CTE.P_ID, OMITTES, METAS, AES_DECRYPT(CHUNKS, 'FrenTree0119!@') AS CHUNKS, AES_DECRYPT(MATCHS, 'FrenTree0119!@') AS MATCHS FROM CTE LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_FIND_DETAIL FD ON FD.TARGET_ID = CTE.TARGET_ID AND FD.AP_NO = CTE.AP_NO AND CTE.HASH_ID = FD.HASH_ID WHERE CTE.FID IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM , '-') AS SERVICE_NM, T.NAME, IFNULL(A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '-') AS AGENT_CONNECTED_IP FROM PI_TARGETS T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO WHERE T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no} LIMIT 1

SELECT TARGET_ID, HASH_ID AS ID, FID AS INFO_ID , PATH, OMITTES, METAS, AES_DECRYPT(CHUNKS, 'FrenTree0119!@') AS CHUNKS, AES_DECRYPT(MATCHS,'FrenTree0119!@') AS MATCHS FROM PI_FIND_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.HASH_ID = (#{hash_id}) AND FD.AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND FD.TARGET_ID = #{target_id}
select DATA_PROCESSING_CHARGE_ID from pi_data_processing_charge_group where DOC_ID = #{IFIDVALUE}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_DATA_PROCESSING_USER (CHARGE_ID, CHARGE_USER_CNT, CHARGE_USER_FLAGE, user_no, ok_user_no, regdate, IFIDVALUE, approval_type) VALUES (#{CHARGE_ID} ,#{CHARGE_USER_CNT}, #{CHARGE_USER_FLAGE}, #{user_no}, #{ok_user_no}, now(), #{IFIDVALUE}, #{approval_type})
mapper.select: SELECT COM, PWD FROM PI_SETTING_DATA WHERE NAME ='mail' AND STATUS != 'N' ORDER BY IDX DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T.NAME, IFNULL(A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '-') AS AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM, '-') AS SERVICE_NM FROM pi_data_processing DP LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON DP.target_id = T.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = T.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON A.agent_name = T.NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT TARGET_ID, AP_NO, TARGET_USE , SERVICE_NM FROM PI_TARGET_USER)TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO AND TU.TARGET_USE = 'Y' WHERE DP.data_processing_group_idx = #{pathGroupId} GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO

SELECT CONCAT('TYPE', CP.PATTERN_IDX) AS pattern_idx, pattern_code, CP.pattern_kr_name, 0 as matchLimitCnt, CP.mask_cnt, CP.mask_type, CP.mask_chk FROM PI_CUSTOM_PATTERN CP ORDER BY CP.PATTERN_IDX ASC
